input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Check latest articles for Champions League, Liverpool, Oslo embassy, Beirut
fname = 'articles/2026/03/06/articles.jsonl'
kws = ['oslo embassy', 'embassy bomb', 'beirut strike', 'beirut district', 'hezbollah', 'champions league', 'liverpool', 'real madrid', 'psg chelsea', 'ipl', 'newcastle barcelona', 'manchester united']
with open(fname) as f:
    for line in f:
        art = json.loads(line)
        title = (art.get('title','') or '').lower()
        for kw in kws:
            if kw in title:
                print(f'[{kw}] {(art.get(\"title\",\"\") or \"\")[:140]}')
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -20
